org.docgene.model

Class XMLSeeAlsoHeading

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLReference
      • org.docgene.model.XMLSeeAlsoHeading
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.ArticleReference, org.docgene.model.ElementReference, org.docgene.model.ParagraphArticleReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLSeeAlsoHeading
extends XMLReference
    Represent a "SeeAlso" reference in the article header.
